com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXHarnessDesign

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXDesign, IXEngineeringChangeOrderAssociatable, IXModuledDesign, IXObject, IXVariantFunctionalModuledDesign, IXVariantProductionModuledDesign, IXWriteableObject

    public interface IXHarnessDesign
extends IXDesign, IXModuledDesign, IXVariantFunctionalModuledDesign, IXVariantProductionModuledDesign
    Interface representing Harness Design.
